transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation. This is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said she'd send a referral to a cardiologist, but I haven't heard anything yet.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can check that for you. Can I get your name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Daniel Hoffman, born March 4th, 1972.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Daniel. I see a referral from Dr. Reyes to Dr. Okafor at Lakeside Cardiology, submitted three days ago. It's currently pending approval from your plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Is there anything I need to do to speed it up?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Not right now, but I can flag it as urgent since you mentioned chest discomfort in your notes. That usually cuts approval time to one business day.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, please do that. I'd really appreciate it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Done. I've marked it urgent and you'll get a text once it's approved, with instructions to call Lakeside Cardiology directly to book.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Daniel. Is there anything else I can help with today?
